description: Set within the exclusive gated community of Shaughnessy Place II, this beautifully updated three-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bath corner residence offers exceptional privacy, backing directly onto VanDusen Gardens—one of the quietest homes in the complex. A grand spiral staircase and glass elevator connect the main levels, while a light-filled solarium with curved floor-to-ceiling glass opens seamlessly to the private garden. The kitchen features high-end built-in appliances, and expansive windows flood the home with natural light. Upstairs, the primary suite includes a private den, terrace, air conditioning, and a spacious spa-inspired bathroom with skylight. Completing the home is a private two-car garage with direct interior access, plus a brand-new furnace and instant hot water system.
